  1. sudokusolver.sudoku

Uses of Record Class
sudokusolver.sudoku.Edge

Packages that use Edge
Package
Description
sudokusolver.sudoku
Models the core domain, structural components, and high-level abstractions of a Sudoku puzzle.
sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
Contains classes extending the abstract SudokuRule class.

  • Uses of Edge in sudokusolver.sudoku

    Methods in sudokusolver.sudoku that return types with arguments of type Edge
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Edge>
    RegionSelector.getEdgeRegion(char c)
    Returns the list of edges in the region represented by the character c.
    List<Edge>
    RegionSelector.getEdgeRegion(String s)
    Returns the list of edges in the regions represented by the characters in the string s.

  • Uses of Edge in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules

    Fields in sudokusolver.sudoku.rules with type parameters of type Edge
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Set<Edge>
    DotsRule.blackDots
    Edges with black dots.
    Set<Edge>
    ConsecutiveRule.edges
    The set of edges separating cells with consecutive values.
    Set<Edge>
    XVRule.vEdges
    The set of V edges (connecting cells that must sum to 5).
    Set<Edge>
    DotsRule.whiteDots
    Edges with white dots.
    Set<Edge>
    XVRule.xEdges
    The set of X edges (connecting cells that must sum to 10).
